data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit and at rest to protect user privacy.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for storage, TLS 1.3 for data transmission.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Provides an extra layer of security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Optional pin-based 2FA via SMS or authenticator apps.

data.title: Anomaly Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors and detects unusual activity patterns to prevent breaches.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms to track and analyze user behavior.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent audits to identify and rectify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Internal and third-party security assessments using automated tools.

data.title: Zero Day Threat Response
data.description: Prepares and rapidly responds to zero-day threats to mitigate risks.
data.technical_spec: Dedicated security team and automated patch deployment system.
